testcase.name: test_build_scenario_returns_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_scenario_analysis.py:75: in test_build_scenario_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"uuid_parsing","loc":["body","base_property_id"],"msg":"Input should be a valid UUID, invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `p` at 1","input":"prop-001","ctx":{"error":"invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `p` at 1"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/uuid_parsing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_build_scenario_returns_values

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'scenario_id' in {'detail': [{'ctx': {'error': 'invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `p` at 1'}, 'input': 'prop-001', 'loc': ['body', 'base_property_id'], 'msg': 'Input should be a valid UUID, invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `p` at 1', ...}]}

testcase.name: test_build_scenario_with_multiple_modifications
testcase.failure: tests/test_scenario_analysis.py:108: in test_build_scenario_with_multiple_modifications assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_build_scenario_component_impacts_have_values
testcase.failure: tests/test_scenario_analysis.py:122: in test_build_scenario_component_impacts_have_values impact = data["component_impacts"][0] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'component_impacts'

testcase.name: test_apply_template_returns_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_scenario_analysis.py:164: in test_apply_template_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"uuid_parsing","loc":["query","base_property_id"],"msg":"Input should be a valid UUID, invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `p` at 1","input":"prop-001","ctx":{"error":"invalid character: expected an optional prefix of `urn:uuid:` followed by [0-9a-fA-F-], found `p` at 1"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/uuid_parsing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
